text:
195 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنْ قَوْلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ: «۝ لَهُمْ فِيهٰا أَزْوٰاجٌ مُطَهَّرَةٌ ۝»
قَالَ «اَلْأَزْوَاجُ اَلْمُطَهَّرَةُ اَللاَّئِي لَمْ يَحِضْنَ وَ لاَ يُحْدِثْنَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.195 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about the saying of Allah (swt), the Exalted: 'They will have therein purified spouses.' [Surah Al-Baqarah 2:25]
Imam (as) said: 'The purified spouses are those who do not menstruate and do not experience postnatal bleeding.'
